message: I had no idea there was so much responsibility for learning outside of class. If I’m doing all this work on my own time, what are they doing in class?
Highlighting important concepts or having us apply information we learned in the readings.  It sounds like a lot.  They don’t have time to cover all content in the lectures.
But I want to have time to develop friendship and explore campus life.

Exactly.  Because I take longer than other people to learn and retain information, the folks hosting the workshop suggested I can take a reduced course load in fall and winter and take spring or summer courses.  Or, take an extra year to finish.

options.text: I wouldn’t want to do that.  I want to get in and out as quickly as possible.
I’ve already decided that I will need more time.
I don’t want to make a decision right now.
